scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint

x-dependency-notes.baileys: Pinned to WhiskeySockets/Baileys commit 802d5f6efa6a78fadb45cd10ce0dbfce5339cbc7 to preserve the reviewed edge build behavior because the published 7.0.0-rc.9 release still fails companion registration in this app. The GitHub package identifies itself as `baileys`, so the dependency is recorded under that installable name and imported through a local wrapper because this commit ships source files without the published lib build. Advance this pin only after intentionally verifying a newer commit or stable release in this app.
